mainText:
Step right up, folks! Bank of Entitlement - where every customer is a VIP and your demands are our commands!

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: I once visited a fancy restaurant and demanded they create a dish exclusive for me-The Hot Josh Special. When the chef hesitated, I dramatically declared that I couldn't possibly dine on anything less than a custom creation befitting my status as a VIP customer. In a panic, the chef scurried back to the kitchen, creating a masterpiece that left other diners in awe.As I took my first bite, the entire restaurant fell into hushed admiration of my culinary influence. The chef emerged from the kitchen, tears of gratitude streaming down his cheeks as he thanked me profusely for bestowing my wisdom upon him. I graciously nodded, knowing that my impeccable taste and unwavering entitlement had once again left a mark on the world.And as I left the restaurant, the patrons burst into applause, recognizing the unmistakable aura of greatness that surrounded me. With a satisfied smirk, I knew that my entitlement had not only elevated my dining experience but had also inspired an entire establishment to reach new heights of creativity. Just another day in the extraordinary life of Hot Josh, where entitlement reigns supreme!
